notes: Blind run. Validator and layout-check scripts were not runnable in the sandbox (Node invocation denied); both audits were performed by hand, reproducing the three validator checks (coords in [0,1]; edge endpoints declared; v(src) >= v(tgt) on every edge) and the four layout-check classes. Draft went through three revision cycles to clear visibility violations, near-duplicates, and stage-boundary straddles.
